Container.Name: media-sorter
Container.Overview: Watches an rclone-mounted Put.io directory and automatically organises video files into your Plex media library. TV shows are sorted into ShowName/Season_XX/ folders with standardised filenames. Movies are placed in a flat movies folder. Files are only moved once their size has been stable across two consecutive scans, preventing partially-synced files from being touched.
Container.Description: Watches an rclone-mounted Put.io directory and automatically organises video files into your Plex media library.

Config.Name: Source Path (rclone / Put.io mount)
Config.Description: Your rclone-mounted Put.io directory on the Unraid host. Example: /mnt/user/putio

Config.Name: TV Shows Path
Config.Description: Destination on Unraid for organised TV show files.

Config.Name: Movies Path
Config.Description: Destination on Unraid for organised movie files.

Config.Name: SOURCE_PATH
Config.Description: [Do not change] Container path for the rclone source mount.

Config.Name: TVSHOW_PATH
Config.Description: [Do not change] Container path for the TV shows mount.

Config.Name: MOVIES_PATH
Config.Description: [Do not change] Container path for the movies mount.

Config.Name: SCAN_INTERVAL
Config.Description: How often (in seconds) to scan for new files. Default 300 = every 5 minutes.

Config.Name: DRY_RUN
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to log what would be moved without actually moving anything. Useful for testing. Leave empty for normal operation.
